title: retort.db and scores.json both unavailable — used test fallback
evidence: retort.db returned sqlite3 error 14 (unable to open); scores.json absent. Ran npx jest directly: 11 passed, 0 failed.
suggestion: No action needed; recorded for cross-run traceability.

title: tsc build command fails due to broken node_modules symlink, but ts-jest compiles fine
evidence: npm run build exits 1 with 'Cannot find module ../lib/tsc.js' in node_modules/.bin/tsc. Tests run via ts-jest without issue.
suggestion: Run npm install with clean node_modules to fix the tsc symlink if a standalone build is needed.
